programme.title: Killer Cases
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - The New Year's Eve Murder'. Police video captures the cries of an Army sergeant as she cradles her dying husband, despite the couples' happy outward appearance, investigators soon accuse the wife of a murder plot.

programme.title: Killer Siblings
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Bondurants'. A pair of larger than life identical twins commit a series of brutal attacks in a small Tennessee town. With each crime, the brothers grow more emboldened.

programme.title: Descent Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Cary Stayner'. Cary Stayner is a serial killer who was convicted of the murders of four women in 1999. Stayner was sentenced to death for the four murders.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. Forensic pathologist Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the murder of Mark Bradbury by his friend Daniel Shovelton, who killed him to obtain his drugs.

programme.title: Murder In The Outback: The Falconio...
programme.desc: 'Murder In The Outback: The Falconio And Lees Mystery. S1/E3'. Former criminal defence lawyer Andrew Fraser questions the verdict of the murder trial, that saw Bradley Murdoch found guilty of murder.

programme.title: Murder In The Outback: The Falconio...
Twisted Killers
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Dead Don't Say No'. In Dearborn Heights outside Detroit, police find a killing field of strangled young women near the train tracks. A massive manhunt leads detectives to a twisted killer with a taste for necrophilia.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S22/E3 - The Untold Story Of Caylee Anthony'. The trial of Casey Anthony for her daughter's murder captivated the American public. In this programme, three of her defense lawyers discuss the shocking case.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Fred & Rose West'. Fred & Rose West raped, tortured and killed young women, including their own daughter. Between them they murdered twelve girls in their house of horrors.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Levi Bellfield'. Levi Bellfield killed two women by bludgeoning them to death with a hammer, and also attempted to murder a third by running her down in his car.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Joanne Dennehy'. Joanne Dennehy stabbed three men to death in March 2013, killing for her own entertainment. She was later diagnosed as a psychotic sadomasochist.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - The Murder Of Cathy Marlow'. When Cathy Marlow's body was discovered at her office, Detectives shut down the whole office block to scour every inch for clues to find her murderer.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Down By The Lake'. Kelly and Johnny Bonds answer the call of a grieving mother, whose 19-year-old son drowned while camping with friends. While the medical examiner ruled it an accident, some suspect foul play.

programme.title: Inside The Mind Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Douglas Perry'. In 1990, a man named Douglas Perry kills three women. By the time authorities track Perry down, more than two decades later, Douglas has become Donna.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Stuart Hazell'. Stuart Hazell feigned tears and begged for the safe return of Tia Sharpe, his partner's daughter. Eventually it was discovered that he had sexually assaulted and murdered her.

programme.title: Coastal Killers
programme.desc: 'S4/E1'. British seaside towns have a dubious reputation for hosting the most remarkable crimes. Coastal Killers looks at the deadly tales from the coastlines of the United Kingdom.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Forensic pathologist Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the murder of Jeffrey Howe, whose body was found dismembered and strewn across the UK by Stephen Marshall and Sarah Bush, all for money.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - No Safe Return'. Kelly and Aaron Sam look into the disappearance of a father who vanished just before he could move back home to his family.

programme.title: Inside The Mind Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Todd Kohlhepp'. Successful real estate agent Todd Kohlhepp hides a deeply disturbing life, one in which he kidnaps, enslaves and kills.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Sheeps Flat Murder Mystery'. The investigation into a Washoe County murder and how it became the first case globally where both the victim and the perpetrator were identified by the Bloodline Detectives.

programme.title: Coastal Killers
programme.desc: 'S4/E1'. British seaside towns have a dubious reputation for hosting the most remarkable crimes. Coastal Killers looks at the deadly tales from the coastlines of the United Kingdom.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Forensic pathologist Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the murder of Jeffrey Howe, whose body was found dismembered and strewn across the UK by Stephen Marshall and Sarah Bush, all for money.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Preacher's Mother'. Kelly and Steve Spingola investigate the murder of Eloise Payne, who was stabbed 38 times in her Michigan home. A car spotted nearby could help to identify her killer.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E8'. How do they turn rosebuds into Turkish Delight? How do they hammer out a silver spoon? And, how do they make sunscreen to block out harmful UV light?

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - No Flukes Allowed'. The racers enter round two in St. Louis and newcomer Big Chief is making big moves to show he's a force to be reckoned with. Team NOLA make its presence felt.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Lethal Landslide'. Parker and his crew help a local family mine in the highlands where a lethal landslide means they witness the harsh realities of living in this remote paradise.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Mercury Rising'. Toxic mercury used by miners in a remote village prompts Parker to build a retort to prevent the dangerous fumes from spreading. But, a surprise flash flood strikes.

programme.title: Extreme Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Hong Kong Bridge'. Stonecutters Bridge has a 1018m span and is an engineering marvel. Host Danny Forster travels to China's south coast to climb it, but will he be able to look down?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E7'. How do they collect the trash in road-free Venice? How do they make Australia's famous sheepskin boots? And, how do they turn pond algae into a health supplement?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E8'. How do they turn rosebuds into Turkish Delight? How do they hammer out a silver spoon? And, how do they make sunscreen to block out harmful UV light?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E9'. How do they create the world's finest canvases? How do they cook up foul-smelling stinky tofu? And, how do they get fifty drinks out of a single bottle of beer?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E10'. How do they look after bees to make millions of jars of honey? How do they build a trike to carry the whole family, and how to stop a bullet with a sheet of ceramic?

programme.title: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Forgette, Artist, Liberty Dock'. Rebecca explores private islands, canals and a tugboat to find the world's best water-inspired houses. She visits a private Californian waterpark.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - De-Ice Ice Baby'. The guys convert a rare Land Rover Defender from right hand drive to left. Plus, Heavy D tries to get money for the shop by parting out a military plane de-icer.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E9'. How do they create the world's finest canvases? How do they cook up foul-smelling stinky tofu? And, how do they get fifty drinks out of a single bottle of beer?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E10'. How do they look after bees to make millions of jars of honey? How do they build a trike to carry the whole family, and how to stop a bullet with a sheet of ceramic?

programme.title: Diesel Brothers
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Yes Way, Jose'. The crew overhaul a truck for a local dad whose F350 broke down. And, they assemble the shop's first-ever diesel motorcycle, with a Magneto!

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Gulf Oil Platform'. Richard takes a helicopter ride out to one of the most remote places on earth: the Appomattox production platform in the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Bitchin' Rides
programme.desc: 'S8/E1 - How Hard Can A Hardtop Be?'. A 1971 Chevy Nova with tremendous pedigree arrives at the shop to get classic styling cues. Most importantly, Dave wants to make this car into a hardtop.

programme.title: Shed And Buried
programme.desc: 'S4/E9 - Episode 9'. Henry and Sam look around a shed full of vintage motorcycles and intriguing memorabilia. The guys see potential in a Yamaha RD350, but can they afford it?

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold
programme.desc: 'S10/E15'. There's a gold rush on but this precious metal is found at the bottom of the Bering Sea. A handful of people are willing to risk it all to bring it to the surface.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: 'S8/E7 - A Yuletide Thanksgiving'. The Kilchers take Thanksgiving off the homestead and onto Atz Sr's floating homestead, the Yuletide. Each person brings something special to share.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E3'. How do they turn seaweed into sushi wrapping? How do they make a beer bottle that lasts for 15 years? And, how do they keep surfers safe from man-eating sharks?

programme.title: Tiny House Hunters
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - 'Livin' Tiny In The Orchard''. Oregon pear farmers, Ben and Erin, are building a custom home on their orchard. To avoid cutting down any trees, the house must fit on a tiny plot.

programme.title: Tiny House Hunters
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Tiny With Lofty Potential'. Sound healer Melanie loves small spaces: she's currently living in a shed on a friend's property. Now, she wants to buy a tiny home - with a twist.

programme.title: Building Off The Grid
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Earth Block Ranch'. Construction projects are stressful, especially if they are in the middle of nowhere. Incredible skill is needed to build on tricky terrain.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Winter's Fortune
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Klondike Beast'. Tony fights the Yukon winter to build a monster dozer. Fred prospects a claim that may be too good to be true and Dustin tries to reach his remote mountain camp.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: 'S12/E6 - Fight Iron With Iron'. Parker fights muddy ground as he opens his biggest cut of the season. Fred discovers a new paystreak that changes the course of his season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - Fortune Favors The Bold'. Dakota Fred and his son Dustin risk their lives to find a fortune in gold nuggets, taking them deep beneath the waters of one of Alaska's wildest creeks.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S4/E14 - Hunt For The Ruby Slippers'. Josh investigates the theft of one of the most iconic pieces of Hollywood memorabilia: the ruby slippers worn by Judy Garland in The Wizard of Oz.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Gulf Oil Platform'. Richard takes a helicopter ride out to one of the most remote places on earth: the Appomattox production platform in the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E10'. How do they look after bees to make millions of jars of honey? How do they build a trike to carry the whole family, and how to stop a bullet with a sheet of ceramic?

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: 'S8/E7 - A Yuletide Thanksgiving'. The Kilchers take Thanksgiving off the homestead and onto Atz Sr's floating homestead, the Yuletide. Each person brings something special to share.

programme.title: Tiny House Hunters
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - 'Livin' Tiny In The Orchard''. Oregon pear farmers, Ben and Erin, are building a custom home on their orchard. To avoid cutting down any trees, the house must fit on a tiny plot.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E3'. How do they turn seaweed into sushi wrapping? How do they make a beer bottle that lasts for 15 years? And, how do they keep surfers safe from man-eating sharks?

programme.title: Extreme Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - Panama Canal'. In danger of becoming obsolete, the Panama Canal is benefitting from a $5.25 billion expansion project. Host Danny Forster explores this intriguing development.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E9'. How do they create the world's finest canvases? How do they cook up foul-smelling stinky tofu? And, how do they get fifty drinks out of a single bottle of beer?

programme.desc: 'S11/E10'. How do they look after bees to make millions of jars of honey? How do they build a trike to carry the whole family, and how to stop a bullet with a sheet of ceramic?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E11'. How do they mine the essential mineral in glass cookware? How do they keep cash safe inside an ATM? And, how do they build a hyper-car out of sheets of cloth?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E12'. How do Australian kangaroos help protect motorcycle riders in a crash? And, how do they clean away years of grime from New York's St Patrick's Cathedral?

programme.title: Extreme Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - The Peruvian Tunnel And Dam'. Danny is in Olmos, Peru, to see how one of the deepest tunnels ever attempted will deliver water to drought-ridden farmers, but can this ambitious project succeed?

programme.title: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Indian, Havvaski, Frying Pan'. Rebecca Budig explores a private lake in Washington, a water retreat in Nevada and a coast guard base in the middle of the Atlantic.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers

programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - The Peruvian Tunnel And Dam'. Danny is in Olmos, Peru, to see how one of the deepest tunnels ever attempted will deliver water to drought-ridden farmers, but can this ambitious project succeed?

programme.title: Diesel Brothers
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. When the guys are challenged to a Tuff Truck, Sparks Motors rebuilds a wasp-infested old Jeep and the Goons rebuild a water-logged Blazer.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Mankind's Biggest Builds'. Richard explores elements that engineering projects have in common. And, he reveals how the challenges get bigger when something is built big!

programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Ed Vs Hakim Isler'. Ed takes on ex-PSYOPS marine and real-life ninja, Hakim Isler, in the Zoige Marshes of Sichuan Province. The unforgiving wetland tests their willpower to the max.

programme.title: The Wheel: Survival Games
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Hunger Games'. Now in the third phase, extreme hunger prompts aggressive hunting techniques from one participant. And Josh is stymied when seeking out fresh water on the island.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold
programme.desc: 'S10/E16'. There's a gold rush on but this precious metal is found at the bottom of the Bering Sea. A handful of people are willing to risk it all to bring it to the surface.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: 'S8/E8 - To Live Or Die On Perl Island'. Atz travels to Perl Island to build a homestead for a friend. Tempers flare as Otto, Eivin, and Levi move an old workshop cabin to Otto's property.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: 'S11/E4'. How do they cast the street lamps of Venice? How do they prevent another Titanic-like disaster? And, how do they grow tiny trees for the ancient Chinese art of penjing?

programme.title: Tiny House Hunters
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Tiny And Ready To Roll'. Firefighter Nicki wants to simplify her life by downsizing from her house to a smaller home. She seeks a place a fraction of the size of her current abode.

programme.title: Tiny House Hunters
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Traveling Nurse Goes Tiny'. A travelling nurse is looking for a tiny home that can move with her on her various job assignments across the country.

programme.title: Building Off The Grid
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Montana Mountain Modern'. A father-son duo builds an off-grid home in Montana. The 720-square-foot home takes advantage of mountain winds by using a wind-turbine generator for power.

programme.title: Catching Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Tug Of War'. The bluefin tuna season is drawing to a close. With one week left, just a few monster fish remain - but cold weather could send the tuna south at any moment.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Viking Returns
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Norse Inheritance'. After guaranteeing a crab delivery, Sig must make good on his deal before time runs out. Mandy finds she has an eye for traditional Norwegian cuisine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S4/E15 - Jean Lasifi's Treasure'. Josh ventures to the American south to uncover the mystery of real-life buccaneer Jean Laffite and the location of his hidden treasure.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid XL
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - Boiling Point'. Makani pushes through the valley to find a new tribe. Ryan hatches a high-risk plan to get a kill. And, the heat forces a survivalist to leave the challenge.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Mankind's Biggest Builds'. Richard explores elements that engineering projects have in common. And, he reveals how the challenges get bigger when something is built big!

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E55 - Adventures in Egg Sitting / Rainbow's End'. The four little dinos are tasked with watching Hegan's eggs, which are soon to hatch. When the dinos learn about a treasure at the end of a rainbow, Rocky is determined to find it!

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E56 - Termy Steps Out / the Tooth Fairy'. Termy wants to visit her good friend Hegan's new babies, Pride and Joy. Rocky is excited when Giganto loses a tooth because that means the Tooth Fairy will visit and leave loot!

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S3/E58 - Tiny Tells / Sleeping Spino'. Tiny likes the attention she gets from announcing the news so she starts a news service. The dinos have to find another place to sleep for the night, but Mazu can't sleep.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E44 - Monster in the Middle, The Good, the Bad and the Monsterly'. Henry and friends get tied together and must work as a team to get free. The new monster turns out to be friendly, not scary.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E46 - Working Monster, Denzel Moves Away'. Mama is to be Roarsville's official music maker so everyone must help at home. Henry thinks Denzel is moving away so plans a party for his best friend.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E48 - Good Morning, Roarsville, Daycare Breakout'. Henry works at the radio station and upsets people when he tells their secrets. Henry's upset when Ivor starts day care so breaks in to get him!

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Seeing Stars/A Tiny Triumph'. Mazu and her three besties map the stars. Tiny's artistic skills are put to use when the dinos are lost in the desert.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Giganto's Laugh/Treasure!'. Tiny and Mazu treat Giganto's toothache. Every dino in Cretacia tries to claim a beautiful pebble!

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Rain, Rain, You're Not a Pain/Runaway Summer'. Rain stops Henry going to the Monster Wave Park, so he comes up with a novel way to have a swim. Summer loses Momma's necklace so she runs away.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Huggsgiving Day/All That Pizazz'. Instead of getting cross with young cousin Harry, Henry lets him help put on a Huggsgiving show. Summer loses the bow she wears when she dances. Can Henry find it?

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S2/E35 - Don't Bug Bill/ Super Marsh'. Bill runs off with Marsh when Mazu showcases the bugs. Marsh admires the four little dinos. They each have incredible talents that are like superpowers.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S2/E36'. When Rocky is unhappy with his present from Tiny, he gets rid of it. Bill plans a quiet dinner party but ends up going off to be alone.

programme.desc: 'S3/E59 - Sleeping Spino/ Mr. Careful'. Tiny wants to help the dinos get along so she invents a game to pair one dino with another. Mount Oblivion seems like it's going to blow, Mazu needs to find her book to stop it.

programme.desc: As Christians, God never promised to keep us away from trials and temptation, but He promised to see us through. Learn some practical keys on how to overcome temptation in this enlightening message by TB Joshua.

programme.title: Testimony Time
programme.desc: Listen to some powerful testimonies of the goodness of God that will build your faith and enjoy a time of prayer with Prophet TB Joshua.

programme.title: Another Ministry: Okobaba
programme.desc: Our contribution to one another is an assignment from God. Watch the Emmanuel TV Team and partners as they cultivate love and generosity by planting their love, strength, joy and time to meet the needs of others.

programme.title: Friends And Heroes
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - No Turning Back'. With Samuel imprisoned and Caleb injured, Macky, Portia and the gang devise a scheme to use storm rainwater to flood the palace jail, hoping to force the guards to open the jail doors.

programme.title: Standard For Life
programme.desc: Christ and His Word are inseparable! Get connected to God's Word and God's Spirit as you listen to this life transforming message live and direct from The SCOAN.

programme.title: The Call Of God
programme.desc: A question brewing in the mind of so many is, how can I know what my calling from God is? Pay close attention as TB Joshua teaches the simple truth of how to recognise and fulfil our calling from God.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E7 - Boots'. Gregg Wallace visits a boot factory in Wollaston, Northamptonshire to follow the production of a pair of Dr. Martens, while Cherry Healey gets to grips with the machines that make shoelaces.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Southern Outer Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores Catholic island life and whether the physical aspect of the landscape makes it easier to make spiritual connections.

programme.title: Iceland with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Alexander Armstrong continues his journey around Iceland where he samples the local delicacy of rotten shark, takes a whale watching trip, plays golf at midnight and sings in a farmers' choir.

programme.title: Exploration Volcano
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Volcano expert Chris Horsley is still in Iceland to check out Katla, one of Europe's largest and most deadly volcanos, which is overdue an eruption.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E4 - Revive Our Oceans'. Prince William and Earthshot Prize Council members Sir David Attenborough and singer Shakira discover how we are damaging the oceans.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Southern Outer Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores Catholic island life and whether the physical aspect of the landscape makes it easier to make spiritual connections.

programme.title: Iceland with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Alexander Armstrong continues his journey around Iceland where he samples the local delicacy of rotten shark, takes a whale watching trip, plays golf at midnight and sings in a farmers' choir.

programme.title: Got Science?
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Your Health and More'. One could be mildly interested in the topic of health or a bracketed health conscious cookie. It has a bouquet of stories that are current and relevant, curated to pique interest.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters
programme.desc: 'S2/E1'. This episode looks at the impact of wildfires and the deadly infernos they cause. Wildfires show no signs of stopping and their inexorability on this planet is truly terrifying.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Hidden Caribbean:...
programme.desc: 'Joanna Lumley's Hidden Caribbean: Havana To Haiti. S1/E2 of 2 - Haiti'. Before leaving Cuba, Joanna gets as close as possible to Guantanamo Bay, before taking a short boat trip to Haiti.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Utah'. Ben Fogle meets two brothers who live in the wilds of Utah.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E10 - The Big Catch'. Ricko DeWilde teaches his children to survive in the wild as they journey to Huslia. Sue Aikens updates her camp to improve her comfort.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Socorro'. Steve Backshall is in Mexico exploring the Eastern Pacific and the Ravillagigedo Archipelago to find ways to protect the local shark population.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E11 - Bad Bones'. Jessie Holmes must build a bridge to gain access to the land beyond his home. Sue Aikens makes critical updates to the facilities in Kavik.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Expedition Unseen'. Steve takes on four entirely new adventures to remote parts of the planet - including Saudi Arabia, Gabon and Mexico - in search of precious natural wonders.

programme.title: Animals with Cameras
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Oceans'. Wildlife cameraman, Gordon Buchanan leads a team using specially designed on board cameras to film ground-breaking new behaviour in some of the animals who depend on our oceans.

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. High in the mountains of Morocco lives a descendant of a long line of macaque rulers who has been in charge of her troupe for many winters.

programme.title: Portillo's Greatest Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Political Railways'. Michael explores how politics, domestic and international, have shaped the railways. He recalls the political decisions which green lit the great North American transcontinental railways.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Ford Class Aircraft Carrier'. In this episode we learn about the construction of the cutting-edge Ford class aircraft carriers, the largest warships ever built - almost as long as the Empire State Building is tall.

programme.title: Patrick Ayree's Wild World
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Biologist Patrick Aryee continues on his breathtaking global road trip. Along the way, he explores how seemingly small disruptions to ecosystems can have far-reaching implications for the species involved.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E4 - Revive Our Oceans'. Prince William and Earthshot Prize Council members Sir David Attenborough and singer Shakira discover how we are damaging the oceans.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - New Zealand'. Ben returns to New Zealand to catch up with the Long family, who live a hunter-gatherer existence on the country's South Island in an area that is two days hike from the nearest road.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Cold Harvest'. Jon and his brother Lee search a vast expanse of tundra on the hunt for a herd of muskox, Kim and Pierre head deep into the bush in an all-out effort to expand their Yukon trapline.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Wonderland Hotel'. Shanghai is renowned for some of the world's most cutting edge architecture. The InterContinental Shanghai Wonderland burrows 16 stories below ground level.

programme.title: Portillo's Greatest Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Political Railways'. Michael explores how politics, domestic and international, have shaped the railways. He recalls the political decisions which green lit the great North American transcontinental railways.

programme.title: Portillo's Greatest Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Political Railways'. Michael explores how politics, domestic and international, have shaped the railways. He recalls the political decisions which green lit the great North American transcontinental railways.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - New Zealand'. Ben returns to New Zealand to catch up with the Long family, who live a hunter-gatherer existence on the country's South Island in an area that is two days hike from the nearest road.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Wonderland Hotel'. Shanghai is renowned for some of the world's most cutting edge architecture. The InterContinental Shanghai Wonderland burrows 16 stories below ground level.

programme.title: Portillo's Greatest Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Political Railways'. Michael explores how politics, domestic and international, have shaped the railways. He recalls the political decisions which green lit the great North American transcontinental railways.

programme.title: Got Science?
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Your Health and More'. One could be mildly interested in the topic of health or a bracketed health conscious cookie. It has a bouquet of stories that are current and relevant, curated to pique interest.

programme.title: Got Science?
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Growing Up'. A dozen external voices, old wives' tales and gentle advice come along as a person takes the journey from childhood into adulthood.

programme.title: Earth's Great Rivers
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 of 3 - Danube'. From crystal-clear waterfalls to baby turtles the size of a thumbnail - explore the magical wonders of the Danube. Branching out across Europe, its tributaries gather water from 19 countries.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Sweden'. Ben Fogle meets a Brit who now lives in the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E11 - Bad Bones'. Jessie Holmes must build a bridge to gain access to the land beyond his home. Sue Aikens makes critical updates to the facilities in Kavik.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Expedition Unseen'. Steve takes on four entirely new adventures to remote parts of the planet - including Saudi Arabia, Gabon and Mexico - in search of precious natural wonders.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Ford Class Aircraft Carrier'. In this episode we learn about the construction of the cutting-edge Ford class aircraft carriers, the largest warships ever built - almost as long as the Empire State Building is tall.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Laos'. Ben travels to Southeast Asia to meet 31-year-old Jon Watkinson, who quit a career in finance for life in a handmade bamboo hut on a remote island on the Mekong River in Laos.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E12 - Inside Out'. Sue Aikens must take advantage of a rare chance for food that has wandered into Kavik. The Hailstones turn to building a native structure to improve their hygiene in the remote wilderness.

programme.title: Extreme Treks
programme.desc: 'S4/E1 - Myanmar, Chin Hills'. Deep in the heart of Southeast Asia lies a region of rugged geography home to a diverse mix of people. A world apart from the rest of Myanmar, the Chin Hills are crossed by walking trails and paths.

programme.title: Dynasties: Making Of
programme.desc: The Dynasties crew reveals the filming techniques used to produce the series.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Wonderland Hotel'. Shanghai is renowned for some of the world's most cutting edge architecture. The InterContinental Shanghai Wonderland burrows 16 stories below ground level.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E8 - Vacuum Cleaners'. Gregg Wallace and Cherry Healey reveal the secrets behind production on an epic scale. This time they discover how a humble but hardy 'Henry' the vacuum cleaner is produced.

programme.title: The Truth About Cosmetic Treatments
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. This programme unearths the modern reality of self-enhancement. Just because we can have any face and body we want, should we? What dangers are lurking behind the promises?

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Georgia'. Ben Fogle reunites with a man with a gift for craftsmanship living in the swamplands of Georgia. Ben discovers he has experienced a life-changing accident in the six years since they last met.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - Abrams Tank'. The mighty Abrams Tank is the US Army's biggest land combat vehicle. Weighing as much as a herd of twenty elephants, this seventy ton monster is turbo-powered to reach speeds of forty-five MPH.

programme.title: Portillo's Greatest Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Railways and Tourism'. Michael Portillo looks at how railways gave birth to modern tourism. The first railway companies were quick to spot a business opportunity.

programme.desc: 'S4/E1 - Stuffed, Spicy And Cheesy'. Michael Symon sinks his teeth into Greek- and Italian-style burgers in NYC. He must sign a waiver to order a spicy rabbit-meat hot dog in Houston, TX!

programme.title: Burgers, Brew & 'Que
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - Smoked Whole Hog'. Michael heads to Asheville, NC, where he smokes a whole hog for traditional Carolina-style pulled pork. Then he finds a supremely spicy burger in Atlanta.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew & 'Que
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - Mountains Of Meat'. Michael devours an Indian-style sloppy joe in Asheville, NC. He tries a katsu-style deep-fried burger in Seattle and pastrami-spiced pork belly in Houston, TX.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew & 'Que
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Brunchtime BBQ'. Michael makes chorizo in Charleston, SC. Plus, in Atlanta an authentic Caribbean roasted pork sandwich has a dedicated local following.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew & 'Que
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Smoked Smorgasbord'. Michael tries a huge bone-in pork chop brined for six hours and fired on a grill. In Phoenix a smoked lamb sandwich is made by a chef who even smokes brownies!

programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - Slammin' Hot And Smoky'. Michael digs into a cheesy pork sandwich in Asheville, NC. In Phoenix, a hot burger is stuffed with spicy jalapeno Jack cheese and covered in Buffalo sauce.

programme.desc: We are living in a broken and hurting world. Are you in desperate need of the Restoring Hand of God? Hope Restoration Ministries presents you with messages of hope and restoration. Keep your Hope Alive.

programme.title: Rouen To Hiroshima
programme.desc: On 6 August 1945, the B-29 Superfortress, Enola Gay, dropped the first atomic bomb over Hiroshima. A documentary tells the story of the bombing campaign that transformed the face of war, from Rouen to Hiroshima.

programme.title: 22 June 1940: The Sound Of Surrender
programme.desc: The Armistice of 22 June 1940 like you've never heard before. We revisit how France ended up in a critical situation with the discovery of negotiations for Hitler's humiliating victory over the French Third Republic.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S12/E7 - King Of Pain'. The Pawn Stars are a man down when Corey arrives at work with an injured hand and ankle. Will he play hurt or will he get benched?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S12/E8 - Free Agent'. Lock and load with the Pawn Stars when a D Moore pistol from the Civil War shoots into the shop. Owned by a black officer from Louisiana, will Rick charge into this negotiation with guns blazing?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S12/E9 - Sticks And Stones'. Stand tall with the Pawn Stars when a letter signed by Napoleon Bonaparte marches into the shop. Marked with Napoleon's official seal, is this a piece de resistance or another Waterloo?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S12/E11 - A Hard Day's Pawn'. The Pawn Stars check out a collection of memorabilia signed by all four of The Beatles. With a guitar autographed by Paul McCartney, can they come together on a price or will they let it be?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S12/E12 - Fool's Gold'. Prepare for liftoff with the Pawn Stars as the guys check out a toilet seat from the NASA Space Shuttle program. Will this deal leave them flush with cash?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: 'S12/E13 - World Series Of Pawn'. The guys look at a Los Angeles Dodgers World Series Pennant signed by Frank Sinatra. Will the connection to ol' blue eyes send the price to the moon?

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: 'S4/E18 - Planes And Flames'. Rick is contacted by Nellis Air Force Base to restore their replica of an F-105 fighter jet. Will the crew be able to execute their plan of attack to restore the fighter?

programme.title: Forged In Fire
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Chakram'. The finalists head to their home forges to make an ancient Indian Chakram, and return with two very different interpretations of the deadly, circular throwing weapon.

programme.title: The Unxplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 of 10 - The Mystery Of Genius'. The ability to change the world in an incredible way: inventing new technology, deciphering the mysteries of the universe, or creating transcendent art - where does genius come from?

programme.title: Historic Hauntings
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Scotland'. Cruel torture and barbaric practices have been perpetrated over the centuries, and the poor tormented souls of the ill-treated are said to still complain of the injustice and pain.

programme.title: Lost Relic Hunters
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Templar Chalice'. Carl and Hamilton are back on more familiar ground with a stunning white marble chalice from Hamilton's Knights Templar treasure hoard, from which the relics they explored in the first series came.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S13/E2 of 30'. Storage unit auctions are the newest and biggest untapped source for hidden treasures, and opportunistic individuals bid on unclaimed properties hoping to strike gold.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S13/E10 of 30'. Kenny tries to reclaim the title of 'King of Whittier', Ivy & Ivy brave the cold to find their fortunes. Lisa graduates to full-fledged buyer.

programme.desc: 'S13/E2 of 30'. Storage unit auctions are the newest and biggest untapped source for hidden treasures, and opportunistic individuals bid on unclaimed properties hoping to strike gold.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.desc: 'S1/E37 of 70'. 'n Diep gesprek tussen Leon en Anja lei tot 'n waarskuwing oor Sanet. 'n Ete dryf 'n wig tussen Meghan en Gys. Nina neem standpunt in teenoor Johan.

programme.title: Kwêla
programme.desc: 'S24/E36 of 44'. Hannes kuier by radiopersoonlikheid Amore Bekker, ons hoor hoe sport Björn Alexander se lewe gered het en leer skaapskeer by 'n matriekmeisie.

programme.title: Wanderlus
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 of 13'. Hierdie week reis Hennie en Nicole van Franschhoek in die Boland tot by Sutherland in die Noord-Kaap.

programme.title: Oppiestoep
programme.desc: 'S7/E9 of 13'. Alombekende storieverteller Gertjie Odendaal kom kuier saam met Auntie Katrina van Namawkwaland en Kokkedoor beoordelaar Marinda Engelbrecht. Schalk maak musiek saam met Nielen Prinsloo.

programme.title: 4x4 Met André
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 of 13'. André word op 'n roete tot teenaan die Wolkberg-wildernis van die Lekgalameetse-reservaat begelei. Hy verken die gebied, voor hulle begin sak van bo in die Bosveld tot onder in die Laeveld.

programme.title: Poena
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 of 26'. Coco het haar hande vol met Franko Vogel, na hulle aandjie saam. Poen en Coco betree 'n nuwe vlak in hulle verhouding. Elton help om Poena se liedjies terug te kry op die internet.

programme.title: Bravo!
programme.desc: 'S12/E32'. Ons bring jou al die glans van die Suidoosterfeesbal. Kuier agter die skerms van die komedie drama, Mada Louw en gesels met Anneline Kriel tydens 'n fotosessie vir die tydskrif Bruis.

programme.title: Ontbytsake
programme.desc: 'S9/E36'. Hierdie week kuier die sterrekundige, prof Pieter Meintjes, hoof van die astrofisika program by die Universiteit van die Vrystaat, by Ontbytsake en die sakefokus val in die Klein Karoo.

programme.title: Winslyn
programme.desc: 'S9/E22 of 26'. Ons gesels met Thys van Zyl van Everest Wealth, HW de Jager van PSG Wealth, en Cecilia Square en Nerina Visser van ETF SA oor sakenuus, aandele en beleggings.

programme.title: Die Real Housewives van Pretoria
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 of 14'. Almal haal 'n private vlug na Renske en Heinrich se wildsplaas waar 'n kompetisie wag wat nie almal by die reëls laat hou nie. Mel en Kiki vat Marié aan oor 'n kontroversiële video van haar.

programme.title: Wie's Nuus
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 of 15'. Met die ANC se leierskapverkiesing om die draai, maak die jongste ANC-swaargewig Paul Mashatile ook aanspraak op 'n top 6-posisie in dié party. Is hy ons land se volgende adjunkpresident?

programme.title: Hier Gaan Ons Alweer
programme.desc: 'S21/E6 of 13'. Weggesteek êrens in Noordwes is geheime waters wat net per boot bereikbaar is. Schalk en Petri baljaar daar onder die karpe en babers en ervaar 'n uitsonderlike lekker hengeldag vol pret.

programme.title: La't Wiel
programme.desc: 'S27/E9'. Die Corolla kry lewe danksy die letters GR-S. Volvo se plan met elektriese motors is 'n baie goeie een en ons kyk na 'n paar gebruikte motors.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S8/E178'. Nazeem en Zoe baklei vir die JPD-raad se stemme, terwyl Justin steeds vies is oor Susan se optrede by Anker. Ty sien uit na 'n aand saam met Lee-Ann.

programme.title: Diepe Waters
programme.desc: 'S1/E38 of 70'. Om 'n verhouding te bou is moeiliker as vlinderslag. Finansies veroorsaak kopsere, en 'n donker geheim sien amper die lig.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S12/E132'. Zee laat die aap uit die mou terwyl die rede vir 'n moord ontdek word. At en Annelize word gedwing om 'n eerlike gesprek te hê wanneer hulle betrap word en Karen bekla haar lot teenoor Liam.

programme.title: Fraksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 of 17'. Tim het 'n groot besluit om te neem. Nina en Schalk droom albei van die toekoms. Jack sukkel om sy emosies te beheer. Henk maak vrede met Susie. Jana is in 'n moeilike posisie.

programme.title: Nataniël. Erik. Wolf.
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 of 11'. Ons families, werkplekke en sosiale kringe spog met uitblinkers. Maak nie saak hoe klein die prestasie nie, dié wat ons trots maak en inspireer, moet gevier word. Ons kook vir die helde.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog 2
programme.desc: The electrifying sequel to the hit movie based on the video game. When Dr Robotnik returns to Earth with a new ally, Knuckles, Sonic and his new friend Tails must stop them.

programme.title: Sweet Autumn
programme.desc: A sweet romantic film. During the Sweet Autumn festival, a young woman and a maple farmer discover the story behind their inheritance of a candy shop.

programme.title: Christmas Comes Twice
programme.desc: A Christmas romance with a time-travel spin. When a woman takes a ride that magically transports her back five years, she gets a fresh start on her career and love life.

programme.title: Once Upon A Lifetime
programme.desc: This magical fantasy drama explores how people can enter your life and change it as a mysterious young girl enters the life of a boy facing a difficult home life.

programme.title: How The Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: Dr. Seuss' How The Grinch Stole Christmas. Jim Carrey plays the infamous Grinch, a creature who hates Christmas and plots to steal it.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat
programme.desc: Based on the beloved children's book, a brother and sister at home alone are visited by a talking cat who opens them up to a whole new world of fun.

programme.title: Dr Seuss' The Lorax
programme.desc: Danny DeVito and Zac Efron bring a Dr. Seuss classic to life in this wonderous animation. In a world with no trees a young boy embarks on a journey to try and bring them back.

programme.title: The Snow Queen 2
programme.desc: This sequel to the 2012 fairy-tale adventure sees the cheerful heroine Gerda return to save her friend Orm and the rest of his troll friends.

programme.title: Anchors Up
programme.desc: Character is tested in this animation. After a bold rescue mission, a young rescue boat is headhunted by a big harbour, but is it too much too soon for him to handle?

programme.title: An Unexpected Christmas
programme.desc: An enjoyable holiday romance. A woman pretends to be still dating her ex as his family assumes they are still together when she runs into him while visiting his hometown.

programme.title: Sydney White
programme.desc: Amanda Bynes retells the story of Snow White in this modern remake set against students in their freshman year of college.

programme.title: Blending Christmas
programme.desc: What's a family holiday without drama? In this Christmas film, a couple tries to get their families to get along during a getaway, but soon their relationship becomes strained.

programme.title: Motorvation
programme.desc: A heart-filled rom-com. After a family tragedy, a small-town janitor/motivational speaker is forced to re-evaluate his life and finds himself having to face all his fears head-on.

programme.title: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: An enjoyable romantic film. After returning home, a jobless reality TV host is tricked into running the town's Valentine's Day festival auction with her ex-fiancé.

programme.title: Spark: A Space Tail
programme.desc: A fun-filled inter-planetary animation. A teenage monkey and his friends embark on a mission to take back their planet from an evil overlord named Zhong.

programme.title: The Snow Queen: Mirrorlands
programme.desc: In this sequel, Gerda embarks on yet another exciting adventure. Now a teen, she gathers with old enemies to free magicians who have been exiled to the Mirrorlands by the king.

programme.title: The Bad Guys
programme.desc: Sam Rockwell lends his voice to this thrilling heist animation. Several reformed yet misunderstood criminal animals attempt to become good, with disastrous results.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: Russell Brand gives the Easter Bunny a funky new edge in this adorable film. The Easter Bunny's teenage son leaves for Hollywood where he hopes to become a rocker.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic...
programme.desc: 'Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie'. Kevin Hart lends his voice to this colourful superhero animation. Two pranksters hypnotise their principal into believing he's a superhero.

programme.title: 10 Things I Hate About You
programme.desc: In this adaptation of Shakespeare's The Taming Of The Shrew, new kid at school, Cameron, hatches a complicated plot to ensure he gets a shot at dating his dream girl.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: When a man meets the girl of his dreams he tells her a careless lie. The more the lie backfires the more ridiculous his quest for love becomes.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: Romcom queen Katherine Heigl and Gerard Butler star in this film. A lonely morning show producer is dragged into her chauvinistic correspondent's experiment to find love.

programme.title: Trainwreck
programme.desc: The talented Amy Schumer stars in this unconventional, raunchy rom-com about a commitment-phobic and hard-partying magazine writer who falls for a sports doctor.

programme.title: Shut Up & Play!
programme.desc: 'S6/E4 of 8 - Overwatch 2 Pt4'. Shut Up & Play! is a gameplay-focused show featuring members of the NPCS. No staff member was hurt in the making of this show (we swear!).

programme.title: Origins
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 of 13 - Mortal Kombat'. Join us as we dig back into history exploring how Mortal Kombat came about and how it took the gaming world by storm.

programme.title: Videogame Nation
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 of 20 - The Legend of Zelda: Twilight Princess HD'. Dan, John and Aoife celebrate The Legend of Zelda's 30th birthday and review Twilight Princess HD.

programme.desc: Margot Robbie, Idris Elba and John Cena propel this sequel to the 2016 film. A task force of convicted supervillains undertakes a deadly mission on the island of Corto Maltese.

programme.title: Fatale
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Hillary Swank and Michael Ealy drive this gripping thriller in which a married man's decision to have a one-night stand in Las Vegas comes back to bite him.

programme.title: Dangerous
programme.desc: Scott Eastwood leads a star cast in this action thriller. A reformed sociopath breaks his parole to uncover the truth about his brother's death, only to get mired in his business.

programme.title: The Miracle Season
programme.desc: Uplifting sports drama. After the tragic death of a star volleyball player, a team of dispirited high school girls must band together to win the state championship.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Haunted...
programme.desc: 'Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Haunted By Murder'. A dead body from the past resurfaces in Lawrenceton, pulling Aurora and Nick into another murder investigation.

programme.title: Colossal
programme.desc: Anne Hathaway drives this dramedy. When a jobless party girl moves back home a monster begins attacking South Korea. Soon she discovers she's connected to the beast.

programme.title: InSight
programme.desc: An ER nurse, who is tending to a young victim, is accidentally electrocuted by the defibrillator. She soon starts to experience the victim's memories.

programme.title: Warcraft
programme.desc: The popular fantasy gaming series makes a spectacular big-screen debut. A saga of power, survival and sacrifice unfolds when the peaceful existence of a civilisation is threatened.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: From the director of Tron, comes a sci-fi epic with Tom Cruise. As a drone repairman on an evacuated Earth, Cruise discovers a spacecraft that will change everything he knew.

programme.title: The Card Counter
programme.desc: Oscar Isaac drives this thrilling action drama. An ex-military interrogator turned gambler has a chance at redemption, but he soon finds himself faced with the ghosts of his past.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: Action legend Sylvester Stallone stars in this tense thriller about a man who's wrongly incarcerated and must now get out of an 'escape-proof' prison that he designed.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: Action legend Sylvester Stallone stars in this tense thriller about a man who's wrongly incarcerated and must now get out of an 'escape-proof' prison that he designed.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Battle Of...

programme.title: The Flatey Enigma
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Based on a novel, this four-part drama follows a Nordic Studies professor who must solve a riddle in a medieval manuscript to acquit herself from murder.

programme.title: The Old Man And The Gun
programme.desc: Robert Redford tells the true story of a 70-year-old career felon who escaped San Quentin and went on an unprecedented string of heists that captured the country's imagination.

programme.title: Redemption In Cherry Springs
programme.desc: An intriguing mystery film. After returning home following the fallout from a story, a reporter investigates a friend's disappearance, much to the dismay of the local detective.
A visually-gripping, Oscar-winning, Sam Mendes WWI film. Two soldiers are sent on a mission behind enemy lines to prevent the death of 1,600 men who are walking into a deadly trap.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: In this action film, Jason Momoa does everything in his power to defend the ones he loves. A logger fights to protect his family from a dangerous group of drug runners.

programme.title: The Ice Road
programme.desc: Liam Neeson leads this riveting film. After a diamond mine collapses in Canada, a 'big-rig' ice road driver leads a rescue mission over a frozen lake to save the trapped miners.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: Emmy-winning actor Bob Odenkirk leads this action thriller as an unassuming man who is driven to the edge after a home invasion. He goes into a rage to protect his family.

programme.title: Uncharted

programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Snack Pact/The Horror-Scope'. The family discovers an amazing tamale cart and try to keep it a secret from Abuela, Ronnie Anne doesn't believe that 'love will find her,' until it seems to come true.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S6/E2 - Penny Foolish/Nautical Novice'. Mr Krabs sees SpongeBob pick something up off the street and gets the idea that SpongeBob found a penny. Later, SpongeBob's boating school class is on a field trip.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S5/E99 - The Two Faces Of Squidward/Spongehenge'. Squidward is rushed to the hospital when SpongeBob accidentally slams the door on Squidward's face.

programme.title: Middlemost Post
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Dolores Moody'. Parker tries to cheer up the grouchiest woman on Mt. Middlemost-Dolores Moody, Parker, Angus, and Russell must save the S.S. Steadfast from being taken by pirates.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Operation Dad'. Ronnie Anne tries to convince her Dad to move to the city while he is visiting. With the help of Sid, she devices a plan that seems too good to fail.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Flee Market'. Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado during his pizza-versary date with Lori. Ronnie Anne notices she's the only person Carlitos won't copy.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Away Game'. Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their Dad's new apartment permanently.

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Horace/The Boot'. Annie can avoid detention if she can heal the principal's dying plant - later, a half-baked plan of Pony's causes Annie to lose one of her boots.

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Distractions/The Giving Chair'. Pony's constant distractions threaten to derail Annie's part of a science project - later, Annie and Pony discover the comfiest chair in the world.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S4/E64 - Good Neighbors/Skill Crane'. Squidward's lazy Sunday is constantly interrupted by SpongeBob and Patrick's activities, Squidward becomes obsessed with winning a prize from the Skill Crane.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S4/E64 - Good Neighbors/Skill Crane'. When a Skill Crane is installed in the Krusty Krab, Squidward becomes obsessed with winning a stuffed animal from the machine.

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - High Society Sins'. A high society lady ensnares men in her deadly web and sucks the life right out of them. Later, a marriage for wealth falls apart, leading to a shocking murder.

programme.title: Beauty Queen Murders
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Evil Intentions'. A small town is shaken to its core when the local beauty queen, Jackie Johns, goes missing. But who is to blame when the 20 year old turns up dead in a nearby lake?

programme.title: NY Ink
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - 3/1'. Megan gets lost in translation when some non-English speaking customers want a tattoo. Later a budding country music star visits the studio wanting to get inked.

programme.title: Bakers Vs. Fakers
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - All In Oats'. The bakers and fakers are challenged with creating a lava cake, using the surprise ingredient of lavender. But will they impress the judges?

programme.title: Bakers Vs. Fakers
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Upside-Down Fake'. The contestants are challenged with pouring wine into their upside-down cakes. Plus, the bakers must use the surprise ingredient of seed plants in round two.

programme.title: Pit Bulls And Parolees
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Prison Break'. A potential outbreak of canine distemper threatens the ranch. Meanwhile, two parolees head to Texas where a pair of pit bulls have been injured by a porcupine.

programme.title: Pit Bulls And Parolees
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Pushing The Limits'. A vicious swarm of bees cause chaos on the ranch. Plus, three roommates want to adopt a pit bull who can keep up with their fast-paced lifestyle.

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix
programme.desc: 'S15/E8 - Hog-Tie Horror'. Investigator Marisa McHugh and Field Ops Manager Stacie DaBolt rush to the rescue of a dog that has been hog-tied and left to die in a dumpster.

programme.title: Bakers Vs. Fakers
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - In A Pickle'. The bakers and fakers freshen up their carrot cakes with lime in round one. Then, the contestants must use pickles in their dessert to take home the cash prize.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: 'S11/E8 - Fireworks'. Valerie is celebrating America's birthday with a sparkling menu! She makes mini bell pepper poppers with bacon, chipotle barbecue ribs, and kale and carrot slaw.

programme.title: Pit Bulls And Parolees
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - Off The Deep End'. The behaviour of one parolee causes chaos at Villalobos. Meanwhile, a family seek temporary shelter for their pit bull after losing its home in a fire.

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix
programme.desc: 'S15/E9 - Criminal Intent'. Investigator Marisa McHugh works to save the life of a puppy that someone has tried to kill, and then turns her attention to finding out who did it.

programme.title: Bakers Vs. Fakers
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Blondies Have More Fun'. Bakers and fakers go head-to-head in the blondie battle, using the surprise ingredient of bourbon to liven up their dishes. Who will take home the cash prize?

programme.title: Bakers Vs. Fakers
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Make Whoopie Pie!'. The bakers and fakers attempt to mash potatoes into their sandwiched cookie pies. And, how will the contestants incorporate onions into baked sweets?

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: 'S11/E10 - Lights, Camera ... Eat!'. Valerie makes new easy recipes for her website. She serves up savoury morning muffins, kale Caesar salad and pork tenderloin steaks with mustard cider sauce.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S15/E1 - Trisha's Southern Tailgate'. Trisha Yearwood hosts a music-themed tailgate party. She shares fan-favourite recipes and stories from her time on the road with her husband Garth Brooks.

programme.title: NY Ink
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - 3/5'. Iconic tattooist Ami James and the gang at the Wooster Street Social Club deal with a range of customers looking to get inked. What requests for tattoos will they get today?

programme.desc: 'S10/E11 - Waking Up In A No-Wake Zone'. A couple from Urbana, Ohio, wants to change their life and liven things up on Indian Lake. They look for a large turnkey home with a dock for a boat.

programme.desc: 'S4/E10 - Trading Surf For Snow'. After a summer trip to Alaska, Mitzi and Rob are making the move with their five kids from the sunny shores of Hawaii to the snowy mountains of Fairbanks.

programme.desc: 'S2/E8'. As the aftermath of The Last Supper erupts, Noluvo invites the wives on a little getaway to resolve some issues and let their hair down.

programme.title: Mama vs Makoti
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. The kitchen is set for the biggest battle between mama and makoti as they cook up a storm to win over the taste buds of their son or significant other.

programme.title: Shine Shine
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. Supersavvy Mbali Nkosi surprises deserving men and women with a complete makeover.

programme.title: My Zambian Plate
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. When the temperature starts to rise and summer is in full swing, the last thing you want to do is spend time in the kitchen. Luckily Mwaka Mwiimbu has the perfect summer recipes to help you cool down behind the stove.

programme.title: Wawu, That's My Dress: Zambia
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. Chama has brought her aunt and sisters to help her find her wedding dress. Will she go for a ball gown or maybe settle for a mermaid dress?

programme.title: Utatakho
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. Whether it's a father who refuses to acknowledge his child or a mother who wants to prove her child's paternity, we focus on resolving issues of paternity using DNA testing.

programme.title: Papa Penny Ahee
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Papa Penny takes the family shopping for a new car, but Mama Nommy is not impressed with her husband's choice. 'Penny Penny Fire' undergoes a major customisation.

programme.title: My Kenyan Plate
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. A day of fun in the sun is never complete without a delicious picnic. Join Chepchikoni as she makes delicious meals that are perfect for your next picnic.

programme.title: My Horror Love Story: South Africa
programme.desc: 'S3/E5'. What happens when the love of your life turns into an abusive monster? Tshidi Monke was hospitalised in a psychiatric ward while pregnant.

programme.title: Sangoma, Khanyisa!
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Ndiyakholwa lost his hearing and Phumla's sons are fighting like cats and dogs. Will our sangoma find them answers? Hosted by Penny Lebyane.

programme.title: The Buzz
programme.desc: 'S7/E13'. The Buzz receives a mail from a young woman who has taken her father to court, but is struggling to decide if she did the right thing.

programme.title: OPW: The Remix
programme.desc: 'S1/E21'. In this fast-paced and humorous series, we revisit some of the continent's most memorable and jaw-dropping wedding moments from the popular series.

programme.title: Pastors' Wives
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. Anietie plans a cookout that ends in a disaster which leaves the attending wives frustrated, and Nandi, with a bone to pick with her supposed friend Anietie.

programme.title: My Kenyan Plate
programme.desc: 'S2/E5'. In our busy lives, time is precious and no-one wants to be stuck in the kitchen all day! This week, Mwaka Mwiimbu shares simple and tasty quick-fix meals to get you through those days where you really don't feel like cooking.

programme.title: 7 Colours
programme.desc: 'S2/E5'. For this Johannesburg 7 Colours, Cleopatra and Tshepo cook beef stew with samp and pumpkin mash, while Sindiswa and Lungile try to win the judges over with pork steak and sweet and sour sticky chicken.

programme.title: The Big Bozza Cook-off
programme.desc: 'S2/E5'. A traditional Cape Town dish, known as a Gatsby, is what our two chefs are challenged to make in this episode. The Bozza foodies also ask them to create something deliciously sweet with toffee.

programme.title: Yes! Ndio! Beeni!: Kenya
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. A top team of event planners help a man propose to the love of his life. Will the unforgettable proposal be good enough to get a yes?

programme.title: Making The Menu
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Two food bloggers face off at a restaurant to see whose dish gets the restaurateur's approval and gets included on the menu.

programme.title: Utatakho
programme.desc: 'S2/E5'. Whether it's a father who refuses to acknowledge his child or a mother who wants to prove her child's paternity, we focus on resolving issues of paternity using DNA testing.

programme.title: This Money Will Change My Life
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Philisande wants to win R25 000 to expand his business. He is up against Masixole who wants to establish the first call centre in his township.

programme.title: Yes, I Have HIV: South Africa
Will He Say Yes?
programme.desc: 'S2/E5'. Ayanda and Gil are both musicians. They met and fell in love in the music studio, and wrote and produced a love song together expressing their love for each other.

programme.title: The Buzz
programme.desc: 'S7/E9'. Simz from South Africa asks The Buzz Panel how important it is to have a relationship with your in-laws.

programme.title: 7 Colours
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. Mandisa and Khanyisile take the judges around the world with their three-course meal while cousins Amanda and Sebenzile take them back to their childhood. Who will impress the judges the most and take home the R5 000 cash prize?

programme.title: The Big Bozza Cook-off
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. This week our Bozza chefs have one hour to cook a main dish using Phuthu accompanied by two side dishes, and a sweet dish using yoghurt as the treat ingredient.

programme.title: Hair To The Throne
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. Three hopeful hair designers are left to design, style and cut their way to the throne. What twists and turns lie ahead for the remaining contestants?

programme.title: Yes! Ndio! Beeni!: Kenya
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. A top team of event planners help a man propose to the love of his life. Will the unforgettable proposal be good enough to get a yes?

programme.title: This Money Will Change My Life
Yes, I Have HIV: South Africa
Will He Say Yes?
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. Mohanua and her boyfriend Jabu have been dating for 13 years. Jabu has been making promises to marry her, but no action. Mohanua is ready for marriage and she will be taking the lead and proposing to her man.

programme.title: The Buzz
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. The lively Anele Mdoda heads up a fresh talk show with four co-hosts from different parts of the continent. The women get stuck into viewers' real life dilemmas and each has a vote on the way forward.

programme.desc: 'S1/E22'. In this fast-paced and humorous series, we revisit some of the continent's most memorable and jaw-dropping wedding moments from the popular series.

programme.title: Pastors' Wives

programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - The Labours of Bella'. Tara has a terrible admission to make to Cameron. Bella learns the cost of lying when Esmerelda makes her take an exam to prove her right to the title Supreme Everine.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E88 - Mega Leech'. When Malediktator comes back, now seconded by a Sentimonster, Ladybug entrusts a committed friend and ally with a Miraculous to help her save Paris.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E89 - Guiltrip'. When Reflekta locks herself into a bottomless abyss of guilt, Ladybug calls on an ally with unfailing optimism.

programme.title: Zombies: Addison's Monster Mystery
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - It's Alive!'. Disney Channel features classic cartoons and popular new animated characters, as well as live action sitcoms and an unrivaled range of classic Disney feature films.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S5/E82 - Big Sammich, the'. Raven wants to help Victor maintain a healthy lifestyle and leads by example. Meanwhile, Booker finds a way to impress his Grandpa, but it may just undo all of Raven's hard work.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S5/E83 - Escape from Pal-catraz'. A trip to Alcatraz gets Booker, Ivy and Neil into trouble. After a vision of unsafe practices at the Chill Grill, Raven decides to run the restaurant to prevent a catastrophe.

programme.title: The Villians of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Finding Another Dimension'. As our villain family learns how to blend into their new town, things get complicated with their neighbor, Hartley, when Amy & Jake get their hands on their dad's evil invention.

programme.title: The Villians of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Trust No One'. Fearing Hartley will reveal their true identity, the villainous family decides to blackmail her to keep their secret safe.

programme.title: Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - !chisme! !chisme! Read All About It!'. When an anonymous gossip blogger at school starts spilling embarassing secrets, Violet resorts to questionable measures to stop them.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E47 - The Test Of My Love'. Miley falls for rich kid Trey. His parents are snobs, and Miley almost gives away her secret identity while trying to impress them.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Time After Time'. Harper is surprised to find Griffin at the hatch waiting for her. He says that he saw that she'd traveled back to the date her father died and asks if she tried to alter things.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E89 - Guiltrip'. When Reflekta locks herself into a bottomless abyss of guilt, Ladybug calls on an ally with unfailing optimism.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E90 - Crocoduel'. Because of a plan thought up by Marinette, Shadow Moth akumatizes two villains. Ladybug and Cat Noir will need help to stop the evil duo.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E47 - The Test Of My Love'. Miley falls for rich kid Trey. His parents are snobs, and Miley almost gives away her secret identity while trying to impress them.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E45 - Greens' Acres / Dolled Up'. Flashback: Young Bill will do whatever it takes to help keep the family farm in business. Tilly and Nancy enjoy Saxon's birthday at a fancy doll store.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E46 - Gabriella's Fella/Cheap Show'. When Cricket's crush returns, Remy takes the opportunity to help Cricket get to know her. The family wants to visit a street fair, but Bill wants to stay home to save money.

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S2/E25 - Quarantined'. Bree is exposed to a toxic chemical. When Adam and Bree try to get a sample they are captured. Leo is looking after her, but she escapes, then collapses. Can he rescue her?

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S2/E26 - The Rats Strike Back'. Sick of constantly working without time off, the Rats go on strike in an attempt to get what they want, even though Davenport has a big presentation to NASA coming up.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Drifty'. Tara is reunited with Fuggy, her old teddy bear. Fuggy could always get Tara to sleep as a baby, but now he has been mended with golden thread his lullaby sends you to sleep forever!

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Tallulah Brinkworth Meets Her Match'. Tara hatches a plan to pull her magical self out of the tapestry to help defeat Bridget. Instead she pulls out Tallulah Brinkworth, her fictional alter-ego.

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - The Pesky Post'. Luca receives a distressing photo of herself from unknown Big X,. Big X demands money from her, otherwise he threatens to send the photo to the rest of the school. Binny and Melchior take the case.

programme.desc: A cheerleading squad discovers its captain stole their routines from an inner-city school and must scramble to compete at this year's championships.

programme.title: Almost Christmas
programme.desc: A dysfunctional family prepare to spend their first Christmas together since their mother passed away.

programme.title: Alvin And The Chipmunks: The Road Chip
programme.desc: Worried that Dave will dump them if he proposes to his new girlfriend, the Chipmunks travel to Miami to stop him.

programme.title: What Happens In Vegas
programme.desc: A man and woman meet, get married and win a jackpot during a drunken night in Las Vegas, but their plan to get a quick divorce soon goes awry.

programme.title: Coming To America
programme.desc: An African prince spurns the subservient bride his parents have lined up for him and goes undercover in New York to find a more spirited match.

programme.title: Where's The Money
programme.desc: A young man from the LA 'hood meets with a USC fraternity to recover a stash of stolen money so he can restore his father's gym.

programme.title: One In The Chamber
programme.desc: A seasoned assassin plays both sides in a Russian gang war and becomes the target of an unknown enemy.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set
programme.desc: 'E964 of 26 - 964'. Film series going behind the scenes of the latest releases.

programme.title: Chilly Christmas
programme.desc: When he learns his father is being transferred to New York, a boy has one week to turn his crazy canine into a civilised indoor dog.

programme.title: Thor: Tales Of Asgard
programme.desc: The young Norse god Thor embarks on a quest with his brother Loki to find and recover a legendary sword.

programme.title: Serving Sara
programme.desc: A process server is given the job of serving divorce papers to the elusive wife of a wealthy businessman.

programme.title: Preacher's Kid
programme.desc: A girl leaves her stern but loving preacher father behind to seek stardom as a singer in this retelling of the story of the prodigal son.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo 2: Monsters Unleashed
programme.desc: At the opening of the Coolsville Museum of Criminology, a masked figure steals the costumes of several of the gang's old enemies.

programme.title: Battle Los Angeles
programme.desc: When a bunch of people find themselves in the wrong place at the wrong time during an alien invasion, a squad of US marines mount a rescue mission.

programme.title: The Punisher
programme.desc: When an FBI agent's family is killed by a crime boss, he vows to take down the organisation by any means necessary.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: The Return
programme.desc: When the government attempts to terminate the Universal Soldier initiative, the controlling computer goes rogue.

programme.title: Love in Paradise: The Caribbean
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Mixed Signals And Mixed Nuts'. Daniele worries that Yohan just wants a sugar mama who will bring him to the US. Plus, Gaby confronts Abby about her relationship with Frankie.

programme.title: Sister Wives

programme.title: Say Yes To The Dress
programme.desc: 'S12/E13 - Tight, Strapless, And Sexy!'. Carla wants to show more skin than her mum would like, and 52 years-young Dina is ready to try on her gown, saying it will fit right if it fits tight.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant

programme.desc: 'S9/E2 - A Lifetime Of Loss'. Theresa reads Carol, who has experienced a huge amount of loss, and then Theresa does something she has never done before. Plus, Victoria loses her ring!

programme.desc: 'S6/E10 - Any Place But Home'. Amber and Trent push their children to take on more responsibilities around the house. Later, things explode when Amber presses Anna on her plans to move out.
