programme.title: Supercop
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective teams up with his female Red Chinese counterpart to stop a Chinese drug zar.

programme.title: 10 Minutes Gone
programme.desc: Bruce Willis stars in this crime mystery about a heist gone awry. As he was out cold, a man sets to find out what happened in the ten minutes that led to his brother's death.

programme.title: The Big Boss
programme.desc: A young man (Bruce Lee) sworn to an oath of non-violence breaks it after his master is murdered and he discovers the factory he works in is a front for drug-smuggling.

programme.title: What Women Want
programme.desc: Nick Marshall was the ultimate man's man until one night, in the privacy of his Rat Pack dream apartment, his eyes and ears opened more than he could have imagined or ever dreamed of.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan are back but the game has changed. They have to return to the dangerous world to rescue one of their own.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A groom and his groomsmen manage to lose his future brother-in-law while in Thailand for the wedding. To find him, they have to piece together what they did the previous night.

programme.title: Assassin's Creed
programme.desc: Michael Fassbender stars as the popular video game protagonist in this action-packed fantasy. A man is transported into the past of his ancestor who was a master assassin.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: If you're looking for a political action-thriller with heart then catch Channing Tatum as a cop having to save his daughter and the president when the White House is attacked.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: Nuclear tests in the Pacific unleash a monstrous giant reptile. The military bring in a scientific expert to help deal with the threat.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg and Denzel Washington find themselves in way over their heads in this action-packed shoot 'em up. They must find a way to work together in order to survive.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: While tracking down a tycoon's runaway daughter, private detective Ryo Saeba (Jackie Chan) finds himself on a luxury cruise ship commandeered by terrorists.

programme.title: Pound Of Flesh
programme.desc: A man's organs are stolen when he donates them to his dying niece. With the clock ticking for his niece, he carves a blood-soaked path through the city.

programme.title: I Still Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: A murderous fisherman once again stalks two teens who left him for dead.

programme.title: The Legend Of Bagger Vance
programme.desc: A mysterious caddie aims to help a lost golfer regain his game. In the process the golfer's outlook on life is also changed.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: The Wolfpack is back for another chaotic adventure in this insanely funny franchise. This time, they have to deal with more of Alan's antics, kidnapping and the infamous Mr Chow.

programme.title: The Lincoln Lawyer
programme.desc: A sleazy lawyer defends a rich playboy accused of rape and attempted murder. Little does he know he's become ensnared in a twisted and dangerous plan.

programme.title: Million Dollar Baby
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood directs this Academy Award-winning drama. Hilary Swank stars as a young boxer determined to go professional under the guidance of a hardened trainer.

programme.title: Hurricane Season
programme.desc: A high school basketball coach assembles a team of players and leads them on the path to the state championships.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Bigfoot Island'. Is a Sasquatch colony terrorising the residents of a remote island? And, could decades of UFO sightings suggest that aliens are working with the US military?

programme.title: Portals To Hell
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - LaLaurie Mansion'. Jack Osbourne and Katrina Weidman travel to New Orleans to perform the first-ever paranormal investigation of the haunted LaLaurie Mansion.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Cattle Mutilation Mystery'. Paul looks for answers in a 60-year-old string of unsolved cattle mutilations across the US. He heads to a remote Nebraska farm to uncover the truth.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - The Ozark Howler'. Recently disclosed audio recordings and astonishing photographs may provide the most conclusive evidence to date that the Ozark Howler may have demonic origins.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Party With The Animals'. The Osbournes are baffled by clips of a ghostly pooch, a doughnut-shaped UFO, a Bigfoot encounter on Christmas and some demonic digging.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Dancing In The Lunar Lights'. The Osbournes watch evidence of ghostly children and alien activity. Plus, they slap on their tinfoil hats for a lunar conspiracy theory.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Return To The Mother Lode'. As the battle for McCarthy wages on, a team of experts work to locate the only known entrance into the Mother Lode mine. But will they find it?

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S20/E5 - Jack The Ripper And More'. Don Wildman investigates a new clue that could identify history's most notorious killer, a peculiar piece of currency and a deadly illness.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S20/E7 - Missing Toe Murderer And More'. Don Wildman examines the case of a murderer with a missing digit, a near-death experience on the edge of space and a wartime canine hero.

programme.title: Alaska Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - The Northern Giant'. The team heads deep into the Alaskan Interior outside of Fairbanks to investigate reports of a gigantic bear-like creature known as the Northern Giant.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Death From Above'. On almost no sleep, the miners split into two groups and set out into Greenland's dangerous landscape for a recon mission into a deadly valley.

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - The Trail Of Murdered Mummies'. Archaeologist Ramy Romany examines well-preserved bodies from more than 2,000 years ago to see if they were victims of human sacrifice.

programme.title: Uncovering Aliens
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Black Ops Conspiracy'. Many people believe that Arizona is the centre of a government cover-up of alien activity. The team travel to Sedona, a known hotspot, to investigate.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S5/E10 - Chasing The Fortune Of Sir Francis Drake'. Josh searches land and sea for Sir Francis Drake's lost fortune. He hunts for a lost cache of Spanish gold and the remains of Drake himself.

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Fire In King Tut's Tomb'. Archaeologist Ramy Romany investigates whether King Tut's mummy was burnt from a change in the mummification process, or was there a more sinister reason?

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - The Alaskan Titanic'. In 1918 the SS Princess Sophia mysteriously sank near Juneau, Alaska. Experts look for answers to the shipwreck as a ghost hunter tries to contact her victims.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S20/E12 - Skyscraper Seance'. Don Wildman investigates a seance to contact the spirit of Thomas Edison and the near-death experience of a woman found frozen in the snow.

programme.title: Alaska Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Alaskan Tiger'. Hot on the trail of a huge feline who has been reported in the town of Paxson, Todd devises a trap, while Levi figures out a way to wirelessly trigger it.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Frozen With Fear'. Time is short in Saqqaq and Eric pushes the team to explore every corner. After Jesse and Gator refuse, only Americo follows Eric up a deadly 1200 ft slope.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Hunt For Flight MH370'. In 2014, Malaysia Airlines flight MH370 vanished without a trace. Did it crash and if so, why can't the wreckage be found?

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - The Dark Pyramid'. A secret government facility in the wilderness may be hiding an extra-terrestrial pyramid. And, are strange forces in the Triangle making wildlife more aggressive?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S5/E11 - Mysteries Of Jesus'. Josh journeys to the Holy Land to investigate a biblical mystery - where was Jesus Christ actually born? Could it lead to a new understanding of Jesus' story?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - The Moon That Disappeared'. Newly discovered documents reveal NASA's secret plan B for failure of the first moon landing. And NASA's Cassini mission unravels a 300-year-old mystery.

programme.title: These Woods Are Haunted
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - I Was Afraid of This Thing'. In Michigan, a father and son go out into the woods to spend time with each other. But one evening they claim to encounter a terrifying Bigfoot creature.

programme.title: Haunted Towns
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Salem'. The Tennessee Wraith Chasers head to Massachusetts, to investigate the infamous Salem witch trials. Why do spirits continue to haunt this quaint New England town?

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S3/E5'. After Nick and Katrina found human bones in their first lockdown at the Monroe House, they thought the case was closed. Now they return to explore further.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Scutt Mansion'. After the owner's tragic death, a Victorian mansion is said to curse all who inhabit it. As Nick and Katrina stay at Illinois' most haunted house, do they risk danger?

programme.desc: 'S5/E10 - Chasing The Fortune Of Sir Francis Drake'. Josh searches land and sea for Sir Francis Drake's lost fortune. He hunts for a lost cache of Spanish gold and the remains of Drake himself.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Dracula, King Arthur, The Queen And The Mistress'. A Transylvanian castle provides the chilling inspiration for a literary villain. Plus, a mythical monarch steps-into the real world at an English Abbey.

programme.title: Alaska Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Sasquatch Of The South'. The team heads to southern Alaska to investigate sightings of a highly temperamental Bigfoot. Todd and Rhett build a huge, electrified tepee to catch it.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Ghost Ship Of The Desert'. After a huge cargo ship suddenly vanishes with 27 crew members on board, new evidence suggests the culprit may be a mythical rogue wave.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - Mystery Of Dead Mountain'. In Siberia, Josh Gates investigates the strange and brutal cold case of the Dyatlov Pass Incident, where nine Soviet hikers died suspiciously in 1959.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Curse Of The Red Planet'. Three cosmonauts die mysteriously as they re-enter Earth's atmosphere. Plus, a NASA rover discovers clues that help solve a murder.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: 'S10/E1 - The Lady In Black'. Steve and Amy investigate the unusual activity tormenting a husband-and wife team of paranormal investigators. Amy experiences something odd during the night.

programme.title: Haunted Towns
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Salem'. The Tennessee Wraith Chasers head to Massachusetts, to investigate the infamous Salem witch trials. Why do spirits continue to haunt this quaint New England town?

programme.title: 2022 FIFA World Cup: FRA v POL

programme.title: 2022 FIFA World Cup Masterplan
programme.desc: 'S22/E2 of 6'. A weekly show hosted by former Pirates football striker Phumudzo Manenzhe where team's tactics will be broken down, players and team's performances analyzed, and the game simplified by the panel throughout the tournament.

programme.title: Plan Van Aksie

programme.title: Meer As Grond

programme.title: Agter Tralies
programme.desc: 'S4/E13'. In 'n oogwink kan alles verander, wat wel die geval was toe Johan binne 'n kwessie van 'n splitsekonde rooi gesien en beheer verloor het. Dié tragiese insident het baie lewens verwoes.

programme.title: Privaatspeurders

programme.title: Jan - R.S.V.P

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Anet Pienaar-Vosloo kuier by Suid-Afrikaanse beeldhouer Adriaan Diedericks en leer hoe hy in die Franse platteland 'n ou vervalle skuur omskep in 'n ateljee.

programme.title: Minki
programme.desc: 'S13/E8'. Lyntjie Jaars kuier in Minki se sitkamer. Sy's 'n Namakwalander in murg en been, en vertel van haar grootwordjare in die Noord-Kaap. Sy het sedertdien haar merk in die vermaaklikheidbedryf gemaak. 'n Rolmodel verras haar.
